--- 
title: "Meta Code Book"
author: "Mahathi Gavuji"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: bookdown::gitbook
always_allow_html: true
documentclass: book
bibliography: [packages.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
github-repo: rstudio/bookdown-demo
description: "This codebook contains information of each measure utilized in varying studies conducted in the Embark Lab."
---

# Introduction

This codebook contains information of each measure utilized in varying studies conducted in the Embark Lab.
